name: Vue
description: Vue language support for Nova using @vue/language-server v3.

config.title: Workspace
config.description: Project discovery and file watching behavior.

children.title: Reset Global Settings
children.description: Restore all Vue global settings to their default values.

children.title: Project Discovery
children.description: Search nested project roots when resolving Vue and TypeScript toolchains.

children.title: Watch Config Files
children.description: Watch tsconfig, jsconfig, Vite, Nuxt, and Vue config files for toolchain restarts.

children.title: Watch Package Files
children.description: Watch package and toolchain package files for toolchain restarts.

config.title: Runtime & Paths
config.description: Executables, SDK paths, and runtime resource limits.

children.title: Node Executable
children.description: Path to Node.js. Leave empty to use /usr/bin/env node.

children.title: Vue Language Server
children.description: Optional explicit vue-language-server executable or JavaScript entry point.

children.title: TypeScript SDK
children.description: Optional explicit TypeScript lib directory.

children.title: Node Memory Limit
children.description: Max old-space memory for the Vue language server, in MB.

children.title: Auto Retry After Memory Error
children.description: Retry once with a higher temporary memory limit if the Vue language server or tsserver runs out of memory.

config.title: Vue Language Server
config.description: Vue language server process and Vue-native language features.

children.title: Enable
children.description: Start the Vue language server for .vue files.

children.title: Restart On Configuration Change
children.description: Restart the Vue language server automatically after Vue extension settings change.

children.title: Completions
children.description: Enable Vue language server completions when supported by Nova.

children.title: Auto Import Completions
children.description: Allow Vue/TypeScript completion items that can add imports.

children.title: Code Actions
children.description: Enable code actions from the Vue language server and allow code action handling in this extension.

children.title: Diagnostics
children.description: Request diagnostics from Vue Language Server when supported.

children.title: Fallback To Language Server
children.description: Forward language feature requests to Vue Language Server when the TypeScript proxy cannot answer.

config.title: TypeScript
config.description: TypeScript-backed Vue features powered by the tsserver proxy.

children.title: Features
children.description: Enable TypeScript-backed Vue features. When disabled, the proxy avoids syncing .vue files to tsserver unless another enabled feature requires it.

children.title: Navigation
children.description: Enable TypeScript-backed hover, go to definition, and find references in .vue files.

children.title: Rename
children.description: Enable TypeScript-backed prepare rename and rename in .vue files.

children.title: TypeScript Code Actions
children.description: Enable TypeScript-backed quick fixes and import actions in .vue files.

children.title: Diagnostics
children.description: Enable Vue diagnostics in .vue files.

children.title: TypeScript Diagnostics
children.description: Show TypeScript diagnostics from the Vue tsserver proxy.

config.title: Diagnostic Triggers
config.description: When Vue and TypeScript diagnostics run for .vue files.

children.title: On Open
children.description: Run diagnostics when .vue files are opened.

children.title: On Change
children.description: Run diagnostics after .vue files change.

children.title: On Save
children.description: Run diagnostics when .vue files are saved.

config.title: Advanced
config.description: Debug logging and raw initialization options.

children.title: Debug Logs
children.description: Write compact Vue extension debug logs to Nova's Extension Console.

children.title: LSP Logs
children.description: Temporarily enable Nova LanguageClient JSON-RPC logging for Vue language server traffic. This can be noisy.

children.title: Initialization Options JSON
children.description: Advanced raw JSON merged into the LSP initialize request. Leave empty for no extra options.

configWorkspace.title: Workspace
configWorkspace.description: Workspace override. Project discovery and file watching behavior.

children.title: Reset Project Overrides
children.description: Remove all Vue project overrides and inherit global settings.

children.title: Project Discovery
children.description: Nested project root discovery during toolchain resolution.

children.title: Watch Config Files
children.description: Watching config files that trigger toolchain restarts.

children.title: Watch Package Files
children.description: Watching package and toolchain package files.

children.description: Automatic restart after Vue extension settings change.

children.title: Auto Import Completions

children.title: Code Actions
children.description: Enable code actions from the Vue language server and allow code action handling in this extension.

children.title: Diagnostics

children.description: Forwarding unresolved proxy requests to Vue Language Server.
